children.text: Home Expressions™ Microfiber 3-pc. Twin XL Sheet Set with Pocket
All items must be the same color, and purchased together to receive Package Deal Pricing.
ZIP code must match delivery address.
ZIP code must match delivery address.
Home Expressions™ Microfiber 3-pc. Twin XL Sheet Set with Pocket

Fall asleep in pure comfort with our sheet set, featuring a soft microfiber construction, a side pocket for storage and a teal geometric tribal print to update any bedroom décor.

•	geometric tribal print
•	soft microfiber construction
•	side pocket allows for storage
•	fitted sheet fits mattresses up to 14" deep
•	polyester
•	washable
•	imported 

3-pc. set includes:

•	flat sheet
•	fitted sheet
•	pillowcase 

Twin set includes one standard pillowcase. Extra pillowcases are sold separately
Please note that some states may charge a disposal fee per item.
